name: Boston Creme Cake
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Prepared Vanilla Pudding (package, frozen, or homemade)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together sugar and shortening until light and fluffy.
2. Beat in egg.
3. Combine flour, baking powder, and salt with milk and vanilla, adding alternately to the creamed mixture.
4. Pour batter into a greased and floured 9-inch round cake pan.
5. Bake at 350°F for 25 minutes.
6. Remove from pan and cool on a rack.
7. When cooled, cut cake into two layers.
8. Spread bottom layer with pudding.
9. Top with second layer.
10. Pour Chocolate Glaze over top, allowing some to drizzle down the sides.
Chocolate Glaze:
1/4 cup Chocolate Pieces
1 tablespoon Butter or Margarine
1/2 cup C&H Powdered Sugar (unsifted)
1 1/2 tablespoons Milk
Melt chocolate pieces with butter or margarine. Remove from heat and stir in powdered sugar alternately with milk until smooth. Makes 6 to 8 servings.
